text: 2. THE WORK: The Subcontractor covenants, promises and agrees to furnish all material, equipment and personal property and to diligently and fully perform and supervise all work herein described on the drawings and specifications and summarized in the description of work for the construction of the Project for the use and benefit of the Owner in strict accordance with the Prime Contract  between  the  Owner  and  the  Contractor,  which  is  hereby  made  a  part  of  the  Subcontract  by  reference  (hereafter  the 'work', 'sublet work' or 'subcontract work'). The Work shall be done to the satisfaction of the Contractor and the Owner and shall be done in timely, faithful and strict compliance with this Subcontract and all the Subcontract Documents defined below. If any part of the Subcontractor's Work depends upon proper execution of any completed work and services performed or otherwise provided by Contractor or other trades on the Project, the Subcontractor shall, prior to proceeding with its Work, inspect existing work and promptly report to Contractor any apparent or discovered discrepancies or defects. The failure of the Subcontractor to examine and report any such discrepancies shall bar any claims thereafter that any defects or delays in Subcontractor's Work are due to defects, delays or disruptions in the activities performed or otherwise provided by Contractor or other trades on the Project.
